message:
feat(freeze): Add unary arithmetic opcode Zig codegen helpers

- Add emitNegOp(), emitIncOp(), emitDecOp() helpers
- Convert .neg, .inc, .dec to use helpers
- Zig output handles overflow/underflow to float64:
  * neg: -INT32_MIN -> float64
  * inc: INT32_MAX + 1 -> float64
  * dec: INT32_MIN - 1 -> float64
- Uses type-safe Zig patterns:
  * std.math.minInt/maxInt for bounds
  * @floatFromInt for safe int->float conversion
  * qjs. prefix for all QuickJS calls
- C output unchanged (backward compatible)

All arithmetic opcodes (add/sub/mul/div/mod/neg/inc/dec) now support
both C and Zig output through unified helpers.
